title: The Pondicherry (Extension of Laws) Act, 1968
full_text: The Pondicherry (Extension of Laws) Act, 1968 पाण्‍डिचेरी (विधि विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम,1968 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196826 Act Number: 26 Enactment Date: 1968-05-24 Act Year: 1968 Short Title: The Pondicherry (Extension of Laws) Act, 1968 Hindi Title: पाण्‍डिचेरी (विधि विस्‍तारण) अधिनियम,1968 Long Title: An Act to extend certain Central Acts to the Union territory of Pondicherry. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 24-05-1968 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Pondicherry (Extension of Laws) Act, 1968 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Extension with amendments of certain laws to Pondicherry and their commencement therein. Section 4. Repeal and saving. Section 5. Extension of rules, orders, etc., under certain laws. Section 6. Rules of construction. Section 7. Power to remove difficulties. Schedule 1.
